class.name: soccer_hardware/SoccerbotSimHardware
class.description: Simulation hardware interface for soccerbot. Integrates each joint with the MIT impedance law the Robostride actuators apply onboard and synthesizes an IMU. Generic over N joints (sized from the URDF). Stands in for the Isaac/Mujoco HardwareInterface in sim-to-real testing.

class.name: soccer_hardware/SoccerbotSerialHardware
class.description: Real hardware interface for soccerbot. Streams a full MIT impedance command (q*, qd*, kp, kd, tau_ff) per joint to the Master STM32 over USB-CDC (COBS-framed, CRC16-CCITT), reads back per-joint state plus a body IMU, and faults if the Master heartbeat goes silent. Contract: docs/architecture/jetson_master_protocol.md.
